note: Score = base_score + sum of tag weights. No clamping — raw values used. Tiers assigned by percentile rank across the active job pool (top 25% = tier_1, 25-75% = tier_2, bottom 25% = tier_3). Tags with status=pending are included in scoring immediately.

solidworks.label: SolidWorks
solidworks.description: Job explicitly requires or strongly prefers SolidWorks CAD

fdm-3dprint.label: FDM / 3D Printing
fdm-3dprint.description: Job mentions 3D printing, additive prototyping, or FDM

fea.label: FEA / Simulation
fea.description: Finite element analysis or simulation tools mentioned

python.label: Python / Programming
python.description: Python, scripting, or programming skills mentioned as relevant

cad-general.label: CAD (general)
cad-general.description: CAD skills required but specific software not SolidWorks (or unspecified)

cad-notsolidworks.label: CAD (Inventor/CATIA, not SW)
cad-notsolidworks.description: Job prefers Inventor, CATIA, or other non-SolidWorks tool — skill gap

mechanism-design.label: Mechanism Design
mechanism-design.description: Cams, linkages, pulleys, actuators, motion systems

prototyping-handson.label: Hands-on Prototyping
prototyping-handson.description: Role emphasizes hands-on build, test, iterate culture

eit-preferred.label: EIT / FE Exam Preferred
eit-preferred.description: Job lists EIT certification or FE exam as preferred or required

portfolio-valued.label: Portfolio Valued
portfolio-valued.description: Job explicitly mentions portfolio of work as a plus

entry-level.label: Entry-Level Title
entry-level.description: Title or description explicitly says entry-level, junior, or new-grad

exp-0-2-years.label: 0–2 Years Required
exp-0-2-years.description: Job requires 0 to 2 years of experience

exp-2-3-years.label: 2–3 Years Required
exp-2-3-years.description: Job requires 2 to 3 years of experience

exp-3-5-years.label: 3–5 Years Required
exp-3-5-years.description: Job requires 3 to 5 years — approaching hard filter

exp-4-plus-years.label: 4+ Years Required
exp-4-plus-years.description: Job requires 4 or more years — hard filter territory

exp-5-plus-years.label: 5+ Years Required
exp-5-plus-years.description: Job requires 5 or more years — hard filter

pe-required.label: PE License Required
pe-required.description: Professional Engineering license required — Seth has FE/EIT, not PE

medical-devices.label: Medical Devices
medical-devices.description: Medical device design, surgical tools, biomedical engineering

robotics-automation.label: Robotics / Automation
robotics-automation.description: Robotics, industrial automation, or automated systems

additive-manufacturing.label: Additive Manufacturing
additive-manufacturing.description: Company focused on additive manufacturing technology or products

marine.label: Marine / Nautical
marine.description: Marine, nautical, boating, or subsea industry

sports-tech.label: Sports / Recreation Tech
sports-tech.description: Sports equipment, recreation technology, or fitness products

food-packaging.label: Food / Packaging
food-packaging.description: Food industry or packaging machinery — lower interest

heavy-equipment.label: Heavy Equipment / Construction
heavy-equipment.description: Heavy construction equipment, Caterpillar, mining — not a target sector

hvac-mep.label: HVAC / MEP Focus
hvac-mep.description: Primary work is HVAC, MEP, or building mechanical/plumbing/electrical systems

applications-engineering.label: Applications Engineering
applications-engineering.description: Role is primarily applications or applications support, not design

sales-engineering.label: Sales Engineering
sales-engineering.description: Role has significant sales or pre-sales responsibility

field-service.label: Field Service
field-service.description: Role requires significant field service, travel, or on-site support

loc-charleston.label: Charleston SC Area
loc-charleston.description: Charleston, North Charleston, Summerville, Mount Pleasant, Moncks Corner SC

loc-coastal-fl.label: Coastal Florida
loc-coastal-fl.description: Tampa, St. Petersburg, Jacksonville, Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Sarasota, Melbourne, West Palm Beach FL

loc-new-england.label: Boston / New England Coast
loc-new-england.description: Boston, Cambridge MA, Portsmouth NH, Portland ME, Providence RI

loc-pacific-nw-midatl.label: Pacific NW / Mid-Atlantic
loc-pacific-nw-midatl.description: Seattle WA, Portland OR, Virginia Beach VA, Baltimore MD, Philadelphia PA

loc-ca-tx-gulf.label: CA Coastal / TX Gulf
loc-ca-tx-gulf.description: San Diego, LA, San Francisco CA, Houston TX, Corpus Christi TX

loc-remote.label: Remote
loc-remote.description: Full or partial remote work offered

salary-65-75k.label: Salary $65K–$75K
salary-65-75k.description: Salary range is roughly $65K–$75K — meets minimum threshold

ownership-selfdirected.label: Design Ownership / Self-Directed
ownership-selfdirected.description: Role emphasizes ownership, self-direction, startup mentality — matches Seth's strengths

security-clearance.label: Active Security Clearance Required
security-clearance.description: Job requires an existing/active US security clearance - Seth does not currently hold one

skill-match-high.label: Strong Skill Match
skill-match-high.description: Job's core required skills strongly align with Seth's strengths: SolidWorks + at least one of FDM/3D printing, mechanism design, Python, or hands-on prototyping

skill-match-mid.label: Moderate Skill Match
skill-match-mid.description: Moderate skill overlap: job requires SolidWorks or one of Seth's strong skills, but also has notable requirements Seth is less prepared for

skill-match-low.label: Weak Skill Match
skill-match-low.description: Job's core skill requirements are primarily things Seth hasn't mastered (e.g., CATIA primary, heavy ANSYS/FEA, PLC/controls, electrical engineering focus)

knowledge-match-high.label: Strong Domain Match
knowledge-match-high.description: Domain closely matches Seth's target industries: medical devices, robotics/automation, additive manufacturing, marine, consumer products

knowledge-match-mid.label: Moderate Domain Match
knowledge-match-mid.description: Partial domain match: adjacent to Seth's targets (aerospace/defense, sports tech, industrial) or role context is partially familiar

knowledge-match-low.label: Weak Domain Match
knowledge-match-low.description: Domain largely outside Seth's background: HVAC/MEP, heavy construction, oil & gas, semiconductor fab, or other industries with no relevant exposure

security-clearance-sponsorship.label: Clearance Sponsorship
security-clearance-sponsorship.description: Company will sponsor obtaining a US security clearance; candidate only needs to be eligible (US citizen, no disqualifying history)

npi-manufacturing.label: NPI / Manufacturing Engineering
npi-manufacturing.description: Role is primarily new product introduction or manufacturing process engineering, not product design

drafting-technician.label: Drafting / Technician Role
drafting-technician.description: Role is primarily a CAD drafting or technician support position, not engineering design; typically requires associate degree and involves executing drawings under engineer supervision
